message:
test: comprehensive test suite improvements

Test files updated:
- bracket_repro.rs: Bracket semantics reproduction tests
- channel_conformance.rs: Channel behavior conformance tests
- common/mod.rs: Shared test utilities
- lab_execution.rs: Lab runtime execution tests
- mutex_async.rs: Async mutex tests
- phase0_verification.rs: Phase 0 verification tests
- repro_cancel_strengthening.rs: Cancel strengthening reproduction
- repro_epoch_barrier_race.rs: Epoch barrier race reproduction
- repro_mpsc_cancel_error.rs: MPSC cancel error reproduction
- sleep_real_time.rs: Real-time sleep tests
- sync_conformance.rs: Sync primitive conformance tests
- timeout_real_time.rs: Real-time timeout tests
- tracing_integration.rs: Tracing integration tests

Security tests:
- authenticated_tests.rs: Authentication tests
- context_tests.rs: Context security tests
- integration_tests.rs: Security integration tests
- key_tests.rs: Key management tests
- property_tests.rs: Property-based security tests
- tag_tests.rs: Tag validation tests
- security.rs: Main security test suite

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
